name: Reader Lenses
description: Audience-depth selection. Every applicable content item renders all three lenses; readers toggle which to view. Orthogonal to the workflow and outcome axes (those are about what the content IS; lenses are about HOW DEEP the reader wants to go).

lenses.name: Corporate / Outcome
lenses.description: For non-technical decision-makers. Frames what the project does for users / business value. Avoids tool names where possible.

lenses.name: Builder
lenses.description: Light-technical. Explains how the project is wired and why key choices were made. Names tools categorically, not by SKU.
lenses.audience: Aspiring vibe coders, peers exploring similar builds

lenses.name: Deep
lenses.description: Full technical. Code, architecture decisions, alternatives considered, tradeoffs. Assumes reader wants the engineering substance.
